target_observables: MEA, MEAH+, MEACOO-, HCO3- concentrations at 30 wt% MEA, ambient pressure
regression_role: Tier A direct liquid-speciation target for MEAH+ and MEACOO- composition residuals
limitations: Ambient-temperature 30 wt% data only; no independent activity or density target in this table

target_observables: NMR liquid-phase MEA, MEAH+, MEACOO-, bicarbonate, carbonate, CO2 at 20 and 40 C
regression_role: Tier A independent NMR speciation target for MEAH+ and MEACOO- composition residuals
limitations: Small local MEA subset; reported NMR uncertainty about 5-10%; high-temperature spectra were not quantified

target_observables: online NMR amine plus protonated amine total, MEACOO-, HCO3-, CO2; 20 and 30 wt% MEA, 293-353 K, loading up to 1.1
regression_role: Tier A MEACOO- target and MEAH+ indirect mass-balance/combined-amine target
limitations: Fast proton transfer reports MEA+MEAH+ together, so MEAH+ is not directly isolated

target_observables: in situ Raman species concentrations for 30 wt% MEA, 303.15-323.15 K, 1-60 bar; protonated MEA, carbamate, bicarbonate, carbonate, molecular CO2
regression_role: Tier B high-pressure speciation extension to digitize/import before final regression
limitations: Not currently digitized in repo; requires tables/SI or figure digitization and source QA

rows_available: 4 MEA end-point rows in article table
target_observables: 13C NMR relative MEA carbamate, free amine, and protonated amine at 20 C for dilute MEA concentrations
regression_role: Tier B/C external validation set for MEAH+ and MEACOO- trends, not primary 30 wt% fit
limitations: Dilute 1.01-4.04 wt% MEA and endpoint-relative percentages; not directly aligned with 30 wt% Jou system

target_observables: density and viscosity of MEA+H2O+CO2, 20/30/40 wt% MEA, loading 0-0.5, 25-80 C
regression_role: Tier B mixture-density target to help constrain fitted ion size/energy after speciation mapping
limitations: Does not directly report MEAH+ or MEACOO- concentrations; requires coupled speciation model during fitting

target_observables: density, viscosity, conductivity, NMR relaxation for ethanolammonium acetate/hexanoate + water; 20-60 C
regression_role: Tier C MEAH+ cation transferability check if acetate/hexanoate anion parameters are fixed or jointly regressed
limitations: Not the MEA carbamate anion; do not use as proof for MEACOO-; anion identifiability must be handled explicitly
